checks.description: Guarded property that read data does not become X or Z unexpectedly after boundary address writes.
checks.pass_condition: rdata may be X or Z only if the write data was X or Z; otherwise it must remain a defined value.
checks.trigger_condition: When waddr or raddr reaches the maximum address value.

checks.description: Conservative functional observation of read data stability when no read enable is asserted.
checks.pass_condition: If renc is low, rdata must not change unexpectedly; changes are allowed only if driven by a concurrent write operation.
checks.trigger_condition: When a write operation occurs without a concurrent read enable.
